input.onePager: AI-Powered Smart Search Bar — natural language search with suggestions, filter chips, instant results preview

poAgentLog.question: Backend/AI service approach?
poAgentLog.answer: Mock Next.js API routes with seeded data
poAgentLog.reasoning: Greenfield demo project with fully specified API contracts

poAgentLog.question: Product data source?
poAgentLog.reasoning: No database/search engine in tech stack; demo project

poAgentLog.question: Recent searches persistence?
poAgentLog.reasoning: No auth system mentioned; 'persisted per user' satisfied by localStorage

poAgentLog.question: No results / error behavior?
poAgentLog.escalationReason: UX/business logic not specified in any input
poAgentLog.humanAnswer: C) Show trending/popular products as fallback

poAgentLog.question: Voice input implementation?
poAgentLog.escalationReason: Scope decision — huge implementation variance between options

poAgentLog.question: Multi-language scope for frontend?
poAgentLog.answer: Backend handles multilingual queries; UI is English-only
poAgentLog.reasoning: Multi-language listed under AI Query Understanding, not UI. Figma shows English-only

poAgentLog.question: Trending searches refresh mechanism?
poAgentLog.reasoning: Next.js App Router + 15-min update maps to ISR with revalidate: 900

poAgentLog.question: Input text update on chip removal?
poAgentLog.answer: Input stays as-is; only API filters change
poAgentLog.reasoning: Component tree shows SearchInput and FilterChips as separate siblings

poAgentLog.question: Results inside or outside dropdown?
poAgentLog.answer: Both — product suggestions in dropdown + separate ResultsPreview grid
poAgentLog.reasoning: Component tree has SuggestionsDropdown and ResultsPreview as separate siblings

poAgentLog.question: / shortcut when other input focused?
poAgentLog.answer: Only activate when no input/textarea focused

poAgentLog.question: Product badge triggers and content?
poAgentLog.answer: Data-driven status labels from product data
poAgentLog.reasoning: Figma includes badge component; API has structured product data

poAgentLog.question: View all results action?
poAgentLog.reasoning: SSR for search page implies dedicated route; preview is top 4 only

poAgentLog.question: Loading states approach?
poAgentLog.answer: Skeleton shimmer for both suggestions and results
poAgentLog.reasoning: SearchSkeleton in component tree; skeleton shimmer in animations spec

poAgentLog.question: SSR scope?
poAgentLog.answer: Client-side search bar + SSR for /search results page
poAgentLog.reasoning: Search bar is interactive (client); 'SSR for search page load' = /search route

poAgentLog.question: Keyboard navigation order?
poAgentLog.answer: WAI-ARIA combobox pattern: arrows for listbox, Tab exits to chips/results
poAgentLog.reasoning: Figma explicitly defines arrow/Tab/Enter/Escape behavior + ARIA roles

poAgentLog.question: Debounce strategy for dual endpoints?
poAgentLog.answer: Single 300ms debounce triggers both in parallel
poAgentLog.reasoning: One-pager and Figma both specify single 300ms value

poAgentLog.question: Search state persistence on navigation?
poAgentLog.escalationReason: UX/architecture decision not addressed in any input
poAgentLog.humanAnswer: C) Both URL params + Zustand (URL is source of truth)

poAgentLog.question: Rate limiting requirements?
poAgentLog.escalationReason: Security/infrastructure decision not mentioned in inputs
poAgentLog.humanAnswer: A) Per-session rate limit (60 req/min) with graceful degradation

poAgentLog.question: Spell correction behavior?
poAgentLog.reasoning: API returns spellCorrection alongside results = corrected query executed

poAgentLog.question: Camera icon placeholder behavior?
poAgentLog.reasoning: One-pager says 'camera icon placeholder only' = present but non-functional

poAgentLog.question: Max chips and overflow?
poAgentLog.answer: No max; wrap desktop, horizontal scroll mobile
poAgentLog.reasoning: Figma specifies horizontal scroll with fade edge on mobile; no max mentioned

poAgentLog.question: Thumbnail aspect ratio and fallback?
poAgentLog.answer: Fixed height, auto width, object-fit cover
poAgentLog.reasoning: Figma gives fixed pixel heights; grid determines width. Missing image fallback not specified
